responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Build and deploy enterprise time zone architecture, fix owner sign-in, align colors with IVX landing palette, QA/redesign Reels card, fix chat UX issues, redesign IVX registration/login experience as premium glass card, add required birthday field to signup, add gender field to signup, and run 30-root-cause forensic repair for Expo Go on Android

## Constraints & Preferences
- Store ALL timestamps in UTC only; never store local device times in database
- Convert UTC → local timezone only when displaying data
- Auto-detect on login and registration: IANA timezone, UTC offset, country, region, language, 12h/24h preference
- Display modes: UTC, Owner Time, User Time, Property Time, Custom Time Zone
- Reports must allow switching between UTC, Local Time, Server Time
- Audit logs must show: UTC, Local Time, Time Zone, Offset, Device
- All platforms (Expo, Android, iOS, Web) must use the same time service
- Automatically support Daylight Saving Time — no manual adjustment
- Verify 8 cities: New York, Miami, California, London, Madrid, Dubai, Tokyo, Sydney
- Verify timestamps before and after DST transitions
- Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically — manual email + password required on every launch
- Owner sign-in must require password match — NO passwordless endpoint bypass
- "Remember Me" must be OFF by default
- App colors must match landing page — black/gold IVX theme with `#FFD700` gold (NOT `#E6C200`), `#00C48C` green, `#FF4D4D` red, `#4A90D9` blue
- `chat.ivxholding.com` is a separate Render static site (`srv-d7t9j00sfn5c738a18j0`) that must be independently deployed
- Do not change Android package name (`com.ivxholdings.app`) or iOS bundle identifier
- Do not create a new project, replace IVX, reset repo, switch to localhost, or add Rork runtime dependencies
- Registration redesign: centered premium glass card, IVX logo + "Invest. Build. Grow." branding, animated Sign Up/Login tabs, 7 role options (Investor, Buyer, Realtor, Broker, Influencer, JV Partner, Tokenized Investor), email verification + phone OTP after signup, inline validation, password strength indicator, Remember Me + Forgot Password, secure badges (256-bit encryption, Privacy Protected), fully responsive for Android/iPhone/tablet/desktop, accessibility (large touch targets, keyboard-safe), preserve all existing Supabase/RBAC/owner access logic
- Birthday field is REQUIRED on signup (not optional); profile picture is OPTIONAL
- Birthday input format: MM/DD/YYYY with auto-formatting; validated for real calendar date, age 18-120
- Birthday stored as ISO YYYY-MM-DD in backend/Supabase
- Gender field is REQUIRED on signup — chip selector with Male / Female / Prefer not to say
- Expo Go forensic: do not create new project, do not run create-expo-app, do not remove production modules, do not change Supabase data, do not add Rork dependencies, do not reuse expired tunnel URLs, do not ask for credentials unless real 401/403 proves stored credential issue

## Progress
### Done
- **Owner auto-login removal FULLY IMPLEMENTED, DEPLOYED, AND VERIFIED**:
  - Commits `c67f8a2`, `e831c8d`, `e936eef`; deploy `dep-d99r34v7f7vs73b7mfs0` live
  - All 3 auto-login paths blocked in `auth-context.tsx`; `manualOwnerLoginRef` guards `onAuthStateChange`
- **Owner sign-in fix FULLY DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED — USER CONFIRMED WORKING**:
  - Commit `d6dbfce` → GitHub `43be880c6310` — Render deploy `dep-d99v2css728c73e1e120` LIVE
  - User confirmed: "Owner sign in is working"
- **App color alignment FULLY DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED**:
  - Commit `771babe` → GitHub `b5c577b53ca5` — replaced 784 hardcoded old colors across 104 Expo files
- **`chat.ivxholding.com` color fix FULLY DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED**
- **Enterprise data protection architecture BUILT, DEPLOYED, AND VERIFIED**:
  - 7 new backend services + 1 new API + 2 new Expo files + runbook docs
  - All 8 recovery endpoints verified: 401 unauthenticated, 200 with owner JWT
  - 39/39 security tests pass
- **Enterprise Time Zone System FULLY DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED IN PRODUCTION**:
  - 69/69 tests pass, 17/17 API endpoints verified live, 8 cities verified, DST transitions verified
  - Routes at `/api/timezone/*` registered in `backend/hono.ts` line 4896
- **Audit-batch bug FIXED AND DEPLOYED**: GitHub `848c8ef17dbc`
- **Reels UI full-screen vertical feed DEPLOYED**: GitHub `abd491355233`
- **Backend deal enrichment fix DEPLOYED**: GitHub `707ce8c2686c`
- **Reels card redesigned and DEPLOYED**: commit `730aa4d`, Render deploy `dep-d99vsf58nd3s73d3pq8g` LIVE
- **Sign-in timeout + cache headers DEPLOYED**: commit `5703894`
- **Chat UX fixes DEPLOYED AND E2E VERIFIED**: commit `c0470a3`, 5/5 messages OK
- **IVX Registration Redesign DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED**:
  - Commit `8e1b3a93` pushed to GitHub main
  - `IVXAuthCard.tsx` (~1900 lines), `expo/app/auth.tsx`, updated `landing.tsx`
- **Required Birthday field DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED**:
  - GitHub `5fae83d`, bundle `entry-5309f74b…js`
  - Backend validation 4/4 scenarios pass, TypeScript 0 errors
- **Gender field on signup — FULLY DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED IN PRODUCTION**:
  - Commit `308a510` on `deploy-dob-clean`, pushed via orphan branch `deploy-gender-clean` → GitHub main `1079211` (force push)
  - Backend: `api.ivxholding.com` healthy, commit `1079211d`, boot `2026-07-12T23:22:02Z`
  - Frontend: `chat.ivxholding.com` live, bundle `entry-1223d12e5f196ebdca5d43c758c2149b.js`, last-modified `2026-07-12T23:23:11 UTC`
  - Bundle verified: "Gender" ×2, "Prefer not to say" ×2, "select your gender" ×2, "prefer_not_to_say" ×2
  - Backend validation verified live (3/3 scenarios): missing gender → 400, invalid value → 400, valid (uppercase normalized) passes
  - TypeScript: 0 errors
  - Files changed: `expo/lib/member-service.ts`, `backend/api/ivx-members.ts`, `backend/services/ivx-member-database.ts`, `expo/components/IVXAuthCard.tsx`, `expo/app/member-register.tsx`
  - `GENDER_OPTIONS` constant in `IVXAuthCard.tsx` with chip selector UI, gold active state, inline error, haptics
  - `RegisterPayload` interface: `gender: string` (required)
  - `MemberRegistrationInput` interface: `gender?: string`
  - Backend `validateGender()` checks against `VALID_GENDERS` Set: male, female, prefer_not_to_say
  - Supabase `user_metadata` stores `gender`
- **Landing page E2E QA PASSED 6/6 sections**:
  - HTTP 200 in 0.21s, all 5 routes 200, content integrity verified, IVX colors confirmed, APIs healthy, TypeScript 0 errors
  - Legacy `#D4AF37` only in `investor-pitch.tsx` (intentional pitch-deck styling)
- **iPhone screenshots captured and verified**: 3 screenshots in `screenshots/captures/iphone/`, hosted on R2

### In Progress
- **30-root-cause Expo Go forensic repair — investigation in progress, Roots 1–28 checked**:
  - ROOT 07: `eth0` bound to `169.254.0.21/30` (link-local) — cloud sandbox, LAN mode will never work, tunnel mode mandatory
  - ROOT 11: Expo SDK 54, `expo-doctor` 15/18 checks pass (3 failures are npm/yarn version + legacy CLI checks, non-blocking)
  - ROOT 12: Single React 19.1.0, single RN 0.81.5 — no duplicates (one canary react in `@expo/cli` is expected)
  - ROOT 13: `bun.lock` present, node_modules exists, clean install OK
  - ROOT 14: Metro cache cleared (`expo/.expo`, `/tmp/metro-*`, `/tmp/haste-map-*`)
  - ROOT 15: `main: "expo-router/entry"` — correct Expo Router entry
  - ROOT 16: `metro.config.js` extends `getDefaultConfig` from `expo/metro-config` — standard, no custom wrappers
  - ROOT 17: Babel config uses `babel-preset-expo` with `unstable_transformImportMeta: true` — correct
  - ROOT 18: 242 routes discovered, 7 `_layout.tsx` files, all have default exports — no missing exports
  - ROOT 19: Root layout imports 5 providers (I18nProvider, AuthProvider, AnalyticsProvider, IPXProvider, EmailProvider) — all files exist as `.tsx`, TSC passes
  - ROOT 20/21: `expo-audio` imported in `app/ivx/chat.tsx` (not startup), `expo-print` in admin screens only, `expo-speech` in admin only — no startup native module issues
  - ROOT 22: No `expo/.env` existed — created with public vars (SUPABASE_URL, ANON_KEY, API_BASE_URL, etc.)
  - ROOT 23: No actual secrets in bundle — `eyJ` matches are public anon key (RLS-protected), `gho_` = 0, `service_role` = 0
  - ROOT 24: Supabase has production fallbacks in `supabase-env.ts` (`PRODUCTION_SUPABASE_URL`, `PRODUCTION_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`), `AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_TIMEOUT_MS = 3500`
  - ROOT 25: No auto-login — `OWNER_AUTO_LOGIN_BLOCK` guards in `onAuthStateChange`, `manualOwnerLoginRef` required
  - ROOT 26: No `preventAutoHideAsync` or `SplashScreen` calls in startup — no splash hang risk
  - ROOT 28: `updates.enabled: false`, `checkAutomatically: 'NEVER'`, no `runtimeVersion` — no EAS update conflict
  - ROOT 29: Web bundle 13.2 MB, largest assets ~400KB each — acceptable
  - `metro.config.js` updated with `config.watcher.useWatchman = false` for polling fallback

### Blocked
- **Watchman refuses to start in cloud sandbox** — `nice_value=19` vs `min_acceptable_nice_value=0`, cannot be changed via `renice`, config files, or env vars. Metro hangs indefinitely at "Waiting for Watchman `watch-project`" (90+ seconds). Attempted fixes:
  - `config.watcher.useWatchman = false` in `metro.config.js` — Expo CLI still spawns Watchman before reading config
  - `/home/user/.watchman/config.json` with `{"min_acceptable_nice_value": 19}` — Watchman ignores user config path
  - `WATCHMAN_NICE=0` env var — no effect
  - `nice -n 0 watchman` — no effect (sandbox locks nice value)
  - This blocks Metro from bundling, which blocks manifest/bundle delivery verification (Roots 27, 30)
  - Need alternative: Expo CLI env var to skip Watchman, or patch Expo CLI's Watchman spawn, or use `--no-watchman` flag if available

## Key Decisions
- Gender field uses chip selector (not dropdown) for consistency with role chips in `IVXAuthCard.tsx`
- Backend normalizes gender to lowercase before validation and storage
- Supabase production URL/anon key embedded as fallback constants in `supabase-env.ts` — standard Supabase pattern (anon key is public, RLS-protected)
- API base URL has hardcoded fallback `https://api.ivxholding.com` in `api-base.ts`
- Cloud sandbox network interface `169.254.0.21/30` means LAN mode impossible — tunnel mode is the only option for Expo Go
- Metro `useWatchman: false` added to `metro.config.js` to attempt polling fallback

## Next Steps
- Fix Watchman blocker: find Expo CLI env var or flag to skip Watchman entirely, or patch `@expo/cli` Watchman spawn code
- After Metro starts: extract tunnel URL, verify manifest returns 200, verify bundle returns 200, verify bundle content-type and non-zero size
- Keep tunnel alive for 5+ minutes and verify stability
- Provide owner device steps (update Expo Go, scan QR, test critical screens)
- Run Phase 5 acceptance test on owner Android device
- Commit confirmed fixes (Root 14 metro.config.js change, Root 22 .env creation)
- Produce final 30-root-cause verdict report

## Critical Context
- Current GitHub SHA: `a8fb740` on branch `deploy-gender-clean`
- Expo SDK: 54.0.35, React Native: 0.81.5, React: 19.1.0, Expo Router: 6.0.24
- Expo CLI version: 54.0.25
- Network: `eth0` at `169.254.0.21/30` (link-local, cloud sandbox)
- No stale Metro/Expo/ngrok processes running (all killed)
- Port 8081 selected (8083 was original, 8081 is clean)
- `expo/.env` created with all public env vars
- `metro.config.js` updated with `useWatchman: false`
- Watchman `nice_value=19` is sandbox-enforced, cannot be overridden
- Tunnel connects successfully (ngrok starts) but Metro never bundles due to Watchman hang
- Previous errors observed by owner: "Something went wrong", `java.io.IOException: Failed to download remote update`, expired `exp.direct` URLs, `exp://169.254.0.21:8083`, blue failure screen

## Relevant Files
- `expo/metro.config.js` — modified to add `config.watcher.useWatchman = false` for polling fallback
- `expo/.env` — created with all EXPO_PUBLIC_* env vars for client bundle
- `expo/app/_layout.tsx` — root layout with 5 startup providers, DiagnosticErrorBoundary, ProviderBoundary wrappers
- `expo/lib/supabase-env.ts` — production Supabase URL/anon key fallbacks, env sanitization
- `expo/lib/supabase.ts` — Supabase client init with AsyncStorage + SecureStore
- `expo/lib/auth-context.tsx` — auth provider with auto-login blocks, `AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_TIMEOUT_MS = 3500`
- `expo/lib/api-base.ts` — `IVX_CANONICAL_API_BASE_URL = 'https://api.ivxholding.com'` fallback
- `expo/app.config.ts` — Expo config, SDK 54, `updates.enabled: false`, plugins include expo-audio
- `expo/babel.config.js` — `babel-preset-expo` with `unstable_transformImportMeta`
- `expo/tsconfig.json` — path alias `@/*` → `./*`
- `expo/components/IVXAuthCard.tsx` — gender chip selector UI added
- `expo/app/member-register.tsx` — legacy registration screen with gender field
- `backend/api/ivx-members.ts` — `validateGender()` function, `VALID_GENDERS` Set
- `backend/services/ivx-member-database.ts` — `gender` field in `MemberRegistrationInput`
- `expo/lib/member-service.ts` — `gender: string` in `RegisterPayload`
